title: Minecraft Reworked (DesgoldGD's version)
description: A mod whose mission is to rework the main progression by adding new items, tool tiers, advancements, and various recipes for a very different and fresh vanilla experience.
body:
A mod whose mission is to rework the main progression by adding new items, tool tiers, advancements, and various recipes for a very different and fresh vanilla-like experience.

**The mod offers:**
- Two new tool tiers between iron and diamond (Reinforced Gold and Coralite)
- Five completely new armor sets, two of those being endgame.
- Three new ores.
- New blocks for building.
- Several reworked or new crafting recipes.
- Several varied advancements that encourage using elements from the mod.
- Change of most chest loots in structures to match progression.
- Add utility to items or creatures considered "useless"
- And other things.

The mod is in an early stage of development, so it's very possible that it may encounter balance issues, bugs, or incompatibilities. Any suggestions or constructive criticism are appreciated.

Also, the mod features its own Texture Pack for a better experience, you can download it here: https://mega.nz/file/32hXkCCK#EXeuCPGSZHg-sb0M6Vsy-PXcFzJNlvahNE3PCZSOnaQ

Available on US english and ES spanish.

Enjoy!
